element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player begins with basic firearm; establishes core combat loop
First special weapon pickup; consumed from Gun Energy gauge
Second special weapon variant; sustained fire option
Advanced targeting weapon; consumable resource management required
Final special weapon; endgame arsenal choice
Player can lie down but can only aim gun left or right; defensive positioning
Assorted mechanical security systems increase in complexity
One climactic enemy at conclusion of each stage
Resource replenishment mechanic; establishes risk-reward cycle

typical_tension_triggers: Gun Energy gauge depletion forcing revert to handgun
Dense robotic enemy placement in mid-stage sections
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Five-stage structure with escalating difficulty; boss punctuates each stage; weapon switching provides tactical tempo variation; resource consumption creates urgency cycles

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stage 1 (space colony ruins) establishes baseline platforming and combat with robotic enemies; player learns weapon switching and Gun Energy management
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 2-3 (underground concourse, enemy hideout) escalate enemy density and boss complexity; special weapons become essential tactical tools
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stages 4-5 (flying spaceship, factory) demand mastery of all weapon variants; final boss represents cumulative skill test
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (end of Stage 1) - introduces damage pattern learning requirement
Stage 5 final boss - synthesizes all gameplay mechanics

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Linear stage progression with stage-end boss
notable_level_patterns.description: Each of five stages presents horizontal movement through themed environment (ruins → underground → hideout → spaceship → factory) culminating in singular boss confrontation
Special weapons (shotgun, machine gun, homing gun, laser, grenade launcher) distributed across stages; encourages strategic swapping and resource awareness
Gun Energy gauge creates depletion timer on special weapons; enemy drops replenish health and ammo; establishes risk-reward for aggressive vs. conservative play
Continuous horizontal movement demanded; prone stance available for defensive moments but limited aiming options maintain forward pressure
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All stages maintain side-scrolling forward momentum
